name: Bailey's Original Irish Cream
recipeIngredient: 1 can Eagle sweetened condensed milk (14 ounce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in a blender.
2. Blend on high speed for 30 seconds.
3. Pour into a tightly sealed container.
4. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
5. Shake the bottle well before use.
6. Makes 4 cups.
